event: Portrait of Saint Alexander Nevsky in armor
symbols: Golden halo — sanctity and divine favor upon the warrior
Armor and weaponry — spiritual warfare and defense of the faith
Upright spear — vigilance and readiness to defend Christendom
description: A tall, bearded man stands in a narrow vertical composition, clad head to toe in elaborate chainmail and scale armor. He holds a long red spear in his right hand and rests his left on the hilt of a sword. A golden halo encircles his head. He wears a richly decorated dark surcoat with heart-shaped ornaments over the armor, and a long cloak drapes behind him. The background is a flat gold-toned surface, giving the image an icon-like quality.
